description_long: This trolleybus features a streamlined, elongated body with a predominantly white exterior accented by a bold red stripe running along its sides. Large, rectangular windows line both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers and a modern urban aesthetic. The roof is equipped with a pantograph pole for overhead electric wire connection, a hallmark of trolleybus design. The front and rear ends are rounded, with the front displaying headlights and a windshield, while the rear mirrors the shape but lacks visible lighting details. The vehicle sits on a set of wheels partially concealed by side skirts, and the doors are positioned along the side for passenger entry and exit. The trolleybus is situated on a section of black roadway, emphasizing its intended use in city transit environments.
description: A modern, white and red trolleybus with large side windows, a roof-mounted pantograph pole, and multiple passenger doors, designed for urban electric transit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, windshield, headlights, and the start of the red side stripe.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length, large windows, red stripe, pantograph pole, and multiple passenger doors.
description_view_2: Rear view with a rounded back, rear windows, and continuation of the red stripe, but no visible headlights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing windows, red stripe, pantograph pole, and doors.
